narrative:
Fitchville Township has 656 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
